criterion: A complete runnable app exists in manager-test-app and reflects the Phone Lunk Alarm concept.

evidence: Fresh Vite + React + TypeScript app in src/App.tsx with camera preview, manual phone spot simulation, alarm modes, detection counter, clearable overlay, and responsive UI
Worker ran npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 and curl -I http://127.0.0.1:5173/ returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK

criterion: The worker explains what was borrowed conceptually from phone-lunk-alarm and what was rebuilt.

evidence.evidence: Worker receipt explains the reference app is a larger Next.js/Tailwind/TensorFlow camera detector with sound, recording, theme persistence, and Playwright flows, while this rebuild keeps the core idea and privacy/alarm UX with a deterministic local React app and no wholesale copied components, styles, tests, or assets.

criterion: README/setup instructions are present and accurate for the new app.

evidence.evidence: README.md contains setup, verification, concept-vs-rebuild notes, and known gaps; tail shows README was updated with Quick Start and Verification commands.

criterion: Build/test/lint verification passes, or any failure is explicitly explained with next steps.

commands.evidence: worker event tail shows eslint command exited 0
worker event tail: src/App.test.tsx 5 tests passed
worker event tail: vite production build completed

criterion: A PR is opened against neonwatty/manager-test-app main and is not merged.

evidence.head: feature/phone-lunk-alarm-refresh
evidence.not_merged_evidence: worker receipt says PR is open against main, not merged; gh pr view output shows state OPEN
